bullet_points: Load the dataset from the provided path.
Calculate the ground truth damping rate γ for each oscillator using the formula γ = b / (2m) to ensure physical consistency.
Implement a robust initialization strategy for each oscillator using FFT-based frequency estimation and peak-envelope analysis for damping and amplitude.
Define the analytical damped harmonic oscillator model and perform non-linear least squares fitting (scipy.optimize.curve_fit) with physical bounds.
Execute the fitting process in parallel using a process pool (max 4 cores).
Calculate parameter uncertainties from the covariance matrix and save the results (fitted parameters, ground truth, and confidence intervals) to a file.
Generate a summary plot comparing the fitted trajectories against the noisy data for a representative subset of oscillators.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Perform robust parameter estimation for all 20 oscillators using non-linear least squares fitting.

bullet_points: Calculate relative errors between fitted parameters (γ, ω) and ground truth values.
Compute the Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) for each oscillator based on model-predicted signal variance versus residual variance.
Perform a sensitivity analysis by correlating the estimated parameter uncertainties (standard deviations from the covariance matrix) with the actual observed residuals to assess goodness-of-fit.
Perform regression analysis to correlate estimation errors with SNR and damping ratios.
Generate diagnostic plots (e.g., error vs. SNR, parity plots for γ and ω, uncertainty vs. residual plots) and save them.
Print all key performance metrics and statistical summaries to the console.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Quantify estimator performance and correlate errors with physical system characteristics.

bullet_points: Interpret the accuracy and robustness of the MLE framework based on the calculated relative errors and confidence intervals.
Discuss the impact of SNR and damping ratio on the precision of parameter recovery.
Explicitly contrast the performance of the MLE approach across different regimes of the damping ratio (low vs. high damping) to evaluate how signal degradation affects optimizer convergence.
Evaluate the effectiveness of the initialization strategy in avoiding local minima.
Write the full Results section, incorporating quantitative findings, interpretations of the generated plots, and conclusions regarding the methodology's validity for underdamped systems.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Synthesize findings into a comprehensive research report.
